metadata.description: Resource name prefix (2-8 chars, used for all resource naming)
Object ID of the deploying user/SP (grants Key Vault Secrets Officer for secret creation). Populated by deploy script.
Azure region for all resources
AAD Object ID for SQL administrator (user or group)
AAD display name for SQL administrator
SuperAdmin password for Knowz application initial setup
Tags applied to all resources (organizations typically add their own via Azure Policy)
Deploy Azure OpenAI (false = use external OpenAI endpoint)
External OpenAI endpoint (required when deployOpenAI is false)
External OpenAI API key (required when deployOpenAI is false)
Name of existing Azure OpenAI resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing OpenAI resource (defaults to current RG)
Chat model deployment name (must match appsettings DeploymentName)
Embedding deployment name (must match appsettings EmbeddingDeploymentName)
Deploy Azure AI Vision for image/diagram analysis (caption, tags, objects, OCR)
External Azure AI Vision endpoint (required when deployVision is false)
External Azure AI Vision API key (required when deployVision is false)
Name of existing Azure AI Vision resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing Vision resource (defaults to current RG)
Deploy Azure Document Intelligence for advanced document extraction
External Document Intelligence endpoint (required when deployDocumentIntelligence is false)
External Document Intelligence API key (required when deployDocumentIntelligence is false)
Name of existing Document Intelligence resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing Document Intelligence resource (defaults to current RG)
Azure AI Search SKU (enterprise requires standard or higher for private endpoint support)
Container image tag (e.g., latest, v1.0.0)
Container registry username (empty = public GHCR)
Container registry password (empty = public GHCR)
API key for the selfhosted API. Auto-generated if not provided.
JWT signing secret. Must be at least 32 characters. Auto-generated if not provided.
BYO Container Apps delegated subnet resource ID. Empty = auto-provision VNet.
BYO non-delegated PE subnet resource ID. Empty AND peSubnetAddressPrefix empty = auto-provision inside BYO VNet.
CIDR to auto-create PE subnet inside BYO VNet (used when byoVnetPeSubnetId empty).
Auto-provision VNet when BYO inputs absent. Set false for strict BYO mode with fail-fast asserts.
BYO Key Vault resource ID (full /subscriptions/.../Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/<name>). Empty = create new per-env KV.
Central Log Analytics workspace resource ID. Empty = per-env LAW.
Customer-provisioned Azure OpenAI resource ID. Empty = deploy local OpenAI (gated on deployOpenAI) or use externalOpenAiEndpoint.
External ACR name (not FQDN) for air-gapped/policy-restricted pulls. Empty = pull from ghcr.io.
External ACR resource group (required when externalAcrName non-empty).
WAF policy mode. Default Prevention for enterprise tier (blocks attacks instead of only logging).
SQL database SKU name. Default S1 for enterprise workload. Basic@2GB dies at ~5 concurrent enrichment jobs.
SQL database max size in bytes. Default 250GB for S1 tier.
Container image registry prefix (e.g., knowz-io for ghcr.io/knowz-io/*). Customize for vendored builds.
Enforce strict ingestion PE (AMPLS) for App Insights. Default false — AMPLS deferred (see top-of-file note).
MCP service key. Default newGuid() on first deploy; pass from KV on rerun. Do NOT use uniqueString() — that is deterministic per RG name.

variables.effectiveRegistries: [if(not(empty(parameters('externalAcrName'))), createArray(createObject('server', variables('registryServer'), 'identity', resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))))), if(empty(parameters('registryUsername')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('server', variables('registryServer'), 'username', parameters('registryUsername'), 'passwordSecretRef', 'registry-password'))))]
variables.effectiveKvUri: [if(not(empty(parameters('byoKeyVaultId'))), format('https://{0}{1}', variables('byoKvName'), environment().suffixes.keyvaultDns), format('https://{0}{1}', variables('keyVaultName'), environment().suffixes.keyvaultDns))]

properties.scriptContent:
param($SqlServerFqdn, $DatabaseName, $AadAdminObjectId, $AadAdminDisplayName)
      Install-Module -Name SqlServer -Force -AllowClobber -Scope CurrentUser
      $token = (Get-AzAccessToken -ResourceUrl "https://database.windows.net/").Token

      # SEC_P0Triage §Rule 5: parameterize to prevent SQL injection via the
      # customer-supplied aadAdminDisplayName / aadAdminObjectId Bicep inputs.
      # Previously these were string-interpolated into T-SQL with a literal
      # identifier, so a crafted display name like
      #   O'Brien]; DROP TABLE Users;--
      # would execute as SQL. sqlcmd variables ($(Name)) are substituted safely
      # and are rejected if they contain reserved chars such as ']'.
      # QUOTENAME wraps the identifier defensively in case a future change
      # reintroduces dynamic identifier usage.

      # Defensive input validation: display name must match the same regex the
      # portal createUiDefinition uses. Reject anything else before the script
      # touches SQL at all.
      if ($AadAdminDisplayName -notmatch "^[A-Za-z0-9 _\-\.@']{1,128}$") {
        throw "AadAdminDisplayName contains disallowed characters: '$AadAdminDisplayName'"
      }
      if ($AadAdminObjectId -notmatch "^[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}$") {
        throw "AadAdminObjectId is not a GUID: '$AadAdminObjectId'"
      }

      $query = @"
        IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.database_principals WHERE name = $(AadAdminDisplayName))
        BEGIN
          DECLARE @stmt nvarchar(max) = N'CREATE USER ' + QUOTENAME($(AadAdminDisplayName)) +
            N' WITH SID = ' + CONVERT(varchar(36), CAST($(AadAdminObjectId) AS uniqueidentifier)) +
            N', TYPE = E;';
          EXEC sp_executesql @stmt;
          DECLARE @role nvarchar(max) = N'ALTER ROLE db_owner ADD MEMBER ' + QUOTENAME($(AadAdminDisplayName)) + N';';
          EXEC sp_executesql @role;
        END
"@
      # SEC_P0Triage §Rule 5 (defense-in-depth): -QueryTimeout 60 is the
      # last-resort guard against a pathological identifier that slips past
      # the PowerShell whitelist regex above and triggers locking on
      # sys.database_principals. Without this, a hostile input that's
      # whitelist-valid but computationally expensive could stall the deploy.
      Invoke-Sqlcmd `
        -ServerInstance $SqlServerFqdn `
        -Database $DatabaseName `
        -AccessToken $token `
        -Variable @("AadAdminDisplayName=$AadAdminDisplayName", "AadAdminObjectId=$AadAdminObjectId") `
        -QueryTimeout 60 `
        -Query $query

properties.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog=McpKnowledge;Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;User Id={1};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName')), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)]

sharedPrivateLinkResource.requestMessage: Front Door private link to Container Apps
Front Door private link to Container Apps API
Front Door private link to Container Apps MCP

message.value: Enterprise self-hosted: byoVnetSubnetId required when autoProvisionVnet=false. Provide a pre-existing Container Apps delegated subnet.

metadata.description: Diagnostic message describing the violated precondition. Surfaced in deployment errors.

message.value: Enterprise self-hosted: either byoVnetPeSubnetId or peSubnetAddressPrefix required when autoProvisionVnet=false. publicNetworkAccess is disabled on SQL/Storage/KV/OpenAI/Search; services unreachable without a PE subnet.

metadata.description: Diagnostic message describing the violated precondition. Surfaced in deployment errors.

message.value: strictIngestion=true requires AMPLS deployment which is not yet implemented. Set strictIngestion=false or file a feature request. App Insights uses public ingestion endpoint by design — see top-of-file note.

metadata.description: Diagnostic message describing the violated precondition. Surfaced in deployment errors.
Name of the BYO VNet that will host the PE subnet. The caller scopes this module to the VNet's resource group via `scope: resourceGroup(vnetResourceGroup)`.
Name of the PE subnet to create. Default: pe-subnet.
CIDR address prefix for the PE subnet (e.g., 10.0.10.0/27). Must not conflict with existing subnets in the VNet.
Principal ID (managed identity principalId) that receives the role assignment.
Role definition ID (GUID). Must be a subscription-scope reference, e.g. subscriptionResourceId("Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions", "<guid>").

Principal type. Default ServicePrincipal — set to User only for deployer pre-grant scenarios.
